productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Solid Grey Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these socks from Reid and Taylor. Made of a cotton and lycra blend fabric, these socks can be worn both for work and casual outings. Made of superfine mercerized cotton and lycra blend for all-day comfort, stretch and absorption of sweat Rib knit mouth with a roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability Enhanced welt for a firm grip Diamond pattern embroidery below the mouth Sock care Machine wash cold in 40 degree water using mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not use softeners Do not iron, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade
